# EduWarn Nepal

> Nepal's trusted home tuition and online learning platform — expert tutors for SEE preparation, Grade 11–12 (NEB), IELTS, and LokSewa, plus curated study resources.

EduWarn Nepal connects students in Kathmandu and across Nepal with vetted home tutors and offers structured online courses, live programs, and study material.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of EduWarn Nepal — services, featured programs, and enrollment.
- [About](/about): Our mission, team, and approach to personalized tutoring.
- [Courses](/courses): Full catalog of SEE, Grade 11–12, IELTS, LokSewa, and skill courses.
- [Tutors](/tutors): Meet our verified instructors and request a home tutor.
- [Programs](/programs): Live bootcamps, workshops, and community events.
- [Blog](/blog): Study guides, exam tips, and educational articles.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach us via phone, email, or WhatsApp.
- [Career](/career): Apply to teach with EduWarn Nepal.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
